info.name: Dealer Hygiene Compliance Backend
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Dealer Hygiene Compliance Backend.

Setup:
1. Run 'POST /auth/login' with Super Admin or Dealership credentials first.
2. The access_token is auto-saved to the collection variable.
3. All subsequent requests use it via Bearer auth.

Hierarchy: Country -> Zone -> Facility (Dealership) -> Areas -> Sub-Areas -> Checkpoints (facility-scoped).

Audits: snapshot per shift (areas -> sub_areas -> checkpoints). Checkpoint completion (is_completed), manual review (PATCH review), AI review (insert on image analysis). Effective review = latest per checkpoint.

item.name: Facility Hierarchy - Areas
item.description: Areas under a facility. DEALERSHIP creates; EMPLOYEE can view. Login as Dealership first.

item.name: Sub-Areas & Checkpoints
item.description: Sub-areas under an area; checkpoints under a sub-area. Create area first, then sub-area, then checkpoint.

request.description: Get or create audit for current shift. Returns audit_areas -> sub_areas -> checkpoints with effective_review.
Returns audit with audit_areas -> sub_areas -> checkpoints; each checkpoint has is_completed and effective_review.
Returns total_checkpoints, completed_checkpoints, completion_percentage, compliant_checkpoints, compliance_percentage.

formdata.description: Select an image (JPEG/PNG) for this checkpoint

request.description: Upload evidence image for audit checkpoint. AI analysis runs in background and inserts an AI review when done.
List all evidence images for the audit (audit_checkpoint_id, checkpoint_name, ai_status, etc.).
Returns AI analysis for the image: ai_status (PENDING|COMPLETED|FAILED), ai_compliant, ai_compliance_score (0.0-100.0), ai_confidence, ai_observations, ai_summary, ai_analyzed_at.
Returns the evidence image file by media_evidence id. Same access as AI result (EMPLOYEE+ with facility access). Response is the image bytes (e.g. image/jpeg).
